title: Canopy Growth (CGC) Stock Forecast and Analyst Price Targets
text: 12 analysts have analyzed CGC with an average price target of $1.75 USD. Analysts' 12-month average price target is $1.40, with a high forecast of $1.80 and a low forecast of $1.02. Canopy Growth has a consensus rating of Moderate Buy based on 2 buy ratings, 2 hold ratings and 0 sell ratings. The Revenue of Canopy Growth is expected to grow by 3.56% in the next year. Next quarter's earnings estimate for CGC is -$0.07 with a range of -$0.12 to -$0.04. For the next year, analysts expect an EPS growth of 91.6% and revenue growth of 3.56%. This implies a price increase of 54.5% is expected in the next year compared to the current price.
